name: generate_site_page
description: Render one client's personal-brand site from site_copy + positioning_brief into a static directory (HTML/CSS/JS, no build step) under that client's OWN preview directory. Owns this client's preview-directory naming (builder's working directory for the run is exactly the preview_dir this tool returns for this client_id — nowhere else). Never reads or writes another client's directory. Purely local file generation — no external side effect, no approval required. Fails loud (does not silently degrade) if site_copy or positioning_brief is missing required fields per artifacts.md rather than rendering a partial page.

fleet_id.description: ID of the parent fleet run this build belongs to.

client_id.description: Client this page is being generated for.

site_copy.description: The site_copy artifact (bio, headline, about, story, claim_refs[]) per artifacts.md — verbatim.

positioning_brief.description: The positioning_brief / ClientBrandMemory snapshot this build is drafted against, for template selection (tone, cta).

media_assets.description: Optional audio/video intro assets already synthesized (via synthesize_voice / synthesize_video_intro) to embed in the rendered page.

preview_dir.description: The client-scoped directory the rendered static site was written to; builder's working directory for the rest of this run.

entry_file.description: Path to the rendered index.html within preview_dir.

side_effects: Writes files to this client's own local preview directory only.
